quiz3.q: There is a kind of ceasefire in the Middle East.
They are still shooting a little.
A truce can still have some fighting.

quiz4.q: Trump says the ceasefire stops everything.
"Moderate" here means less shooting, not zero.
The reporter is talking to the President.
Trump says there is no ceasefire.
A truce always stops all the fighting.

wh.q: Who is the reporter talking to?
wh.a: She is talking to the President.
wrong: She is talking to a teacher.
She is talking to a soldier.

wh.a: Yes, there is a kind of ceasefire.
wrong: Yes, and there is full peace.

wh.a: No, they are still shooting a little.
wrong: Yes, there is full peace now.

wh.a: It means less shooting, but not zero.
wrong: It means no shooting at all.
It means more shooting than before.

wh.a: No, it does not always stop everything.

cloze.text: There is a kind of ___ in the Middle East.
They are shooting in a more ___ way.
A ___ does not always stop everything.

dictation: There is a kind of ceasefire.
The fighting has not stopped completely.
They are shooting in a more moderate way.
A truce does not always stop everything.
